home.title: Compare crypto market cap across cycles and understand where the market stands today.
home.description: Cryptonal helps you analyze total crypto market capitalization, compare different years, study Bitcoin cycle behavior, and generate clear market summaries you can copy, download, and use for crypto content.
home.chartNote: Example chart. Live API data will be connected later.
home.contentTitle: Built for market research, SEO content, and crypto education.
home.contentDescription: The platform starts with general crypto market cap analysis, then expands into individual coins, Bitcoin cycles, altcoin trends, blockchain education, Web3 opportunities, and gaming crypto.

features.title: Market Cap Comparison
features.text: Compare total crypto market cap across different years, cycle highs, cycle lows, and historical turning points.

features.title: Downloadable Analysis
features.text: Generate clear market summaries that can be copied, downloaded, and used for crypto content publishing.

features.title: Crypto Learning Hub
features.text: Publish high-quality guides about blockchain, Web3, Bitcoin, altcoins, DeFi, NFTs, and gaming crypto.

questions: Is today’s crypto market cap higher or lower than previous cycle peaks?
How did Bitcoin behave when the market was at a similar valuation?
Is the market recovering, overheating, or still below long-term trend?
Can this data be turned into readable content for Binance, blogs, or social platforms?

footer.description: Crypto market cap analysis, Bitcoin cycle research, blockchain education, Web3 opportunities, and gaming crypto insights for long-term market learners.
footer.translationNote: Translations are generated by AI and may contain mistakes or misinformation. Always verify important financial information independently.
